nodes.name: Tweet
nodes.notes: Truncates to 280 chars for Twitter. Set up OAuth1 credentials with your Twitter API keys.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ author: 'urn:li:organization:YOUR_ORG_ID', lifecycleState: 'PUBLISHED', specificContent: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.ShareContent': { shareCommentary: { text: $json.content }, shareMediaCategory: 'NONE' } }, visibility: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.MemberNetworkVisibility': 'PUBLIC' } }) }}

nodes.name: LinkedIn Post
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_ORG_ID with your LinkedIn Company Page ID.
